main.description: Create a B2B production order against a registered manufacturer. Per ADR-2605202800 Phase 2, payment.method='escrow_intent' opens a deferred-payment intent AT record; actual USDC transfer occurs at delivery confirmation via @etzhayyim/sdk pay(). Cancellation before delivery writes a refund record (no on-chain tx since no transfer happened).

factoryDid.description: Optional specific factory DID under manufacturer.

productSpec.description: Product specification (free-form per industry — CAD CIDs, BOM, quantities, etc.).

payment.description: Payment intent. Per ADR-2605172100 etzhayyim is on-chain only; tsukuru Phase 2 uses deferred escrow_intent (intent record at create, SDK pay() at delivery, refund record at cancel).

method.description: escrow_intent = intent record at create, pay() at delivery, refund at cancel. direct_pay = SDK pay() immediately at order create (no cancellation refund possible).

amountUsdcMicros.description: Total amount in USDC micros (6 decimals; 10 USDC = 10_000_000).

tokenContract.description: ERC-20 token contract. Default: USDC on Base (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913).

okaimonoOrderRef.description: Upstream okaimono.etzhayyim.com order AT URI (if applicable).

productionOrderUri.description: AT URI of the created production order record.

status.description: pending = order created and waiting manufacturer acceptance; rejected = pre-flight check failed (manufacturer inactive / sanctions / etc.).

escrowIntentUri.description: AT URI of the escrow intent record (if payment.method='escrow_intent').

estimatedCompletion.description: Estimated delivery date based on priority + quantity + industry profile.
